name: Aisha Greyrat
alt_names: アイシャ・グレイラット
description: Aisha Greyrat is the daughter of [Lilia](https://anilist.co/character/179854/Lilia) and [Paul Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88347/Paul-Greyrat) and is the younger half-sister of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) and [Norn Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/145458/Norn-Greyrat).
